flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 25 pp at Fortis Institute-Scranton vs the 2003–2007 baseline (46.8% vs 72.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fortis Institute-Scranton fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (261 → 222).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fortis Institute-Scranton fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fortis Institute-Scranton fell 46% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.2k → $15.3k).
